Provider Dashboard — Brooke Welsh, WHNP

Patient Personas & Outcomes

Cohort trends across your patient base — what's working, for whom, and how well

156 Active Patients
5 Cohorts
Outcome intelligence

Your data, organized into protocols that work.

Every cohort below is built from your patients, your protocols, your outcomes. As Brooke and Nicki finalize protocols, the system learns which combinations move the needle for which presentations. Filter, compare, and use the top-performing protocol as the starting draft for new patients with the same profile.

5
Cohorts
156
Patients tracked
91%
Avg adherence
LT
Low Testosterone (Male)
47 patients
94
/100

Men 35-65 presenting with fatigue, low libido, body comp changes. Total T <400 ng/dL at intake.

Avg Total T Increase
+204%
292 → 887 ng/dL · over 12 wks
+8.4 lbs
Avg Lean Mass Gained
-7.2%
Avg Body Fat Reduction
+4.1 / 5
Energy Score Improvement
91%
Adherence Rate
Top protocol: Pellet + Foundation Stack High (n=47, p<0.01)
  • Treatment Testosterone pellet implant (3-6 mo duration)
  • Supplement Tongkat Ali 2 caps AM
  • Supplement Vitamin D3/K2 1 cap AM
  • Supplement Zinc + Magnesium PM
  • Lifestyle Resistance training 4x/week, 7+ hr sleep target
PM
Perimenopause
38 patients
91
/100

Women 40-55 with irregular cycles, sleep disruption, weight gain, mood changes. Estradiol fluctuating, low progesterone.

Avg Symptom Score Reduction
-68%
Severe → Mild/Resolved · over 16 wks
+3.6 / 5
Sleep Quality Score
-12 lbs
Avg Weight Loss
-82%
Hot Flash Frequency
94%
Adherence Rate
Top protocol: Bioidentical HRT + Metabolic Support High (n=38, p<0.01)
  • Treatment Estradiol pellet + oral progesterone (cyclic)
  • Supplement Magnesium glycinate 400mg PM
  • Supplement Omega-3 2g/day
  • Treatment Tirzepatide (low-dose) for metabolic patients
  • Lifestyle Strength training, protein 1g/lb lean mass
PC
PCOS
23 patients
87
/100

Women 25-40 with insulin resistance, irregular cycles, hyperandrogenism. Goal: metabolic + hormonal balance.

Avg A1C Reduction
-0.6%
5.9% → 5.3% · over 20 wks
+76% cycles regular
Cycle Regularity
-18 lbs
Avg Weight Loss
-34%
Free T Reduction
88%
Adherence Rate
Top protocol: Insulin-Sensitizing + Anti-Androgen Stack Moderate (n=23, p<0.05)
  • Supplement Inositol (Myo + D-Chiro 40:1) 4g/day
  • Treatment Metformin 500mg BID
  • Treatment Tirzepatide (escalating dose) for BMI >30
  • Supplement Vitamin D3 5000 IU, Berberine 500mg TID
  • Lifestyle Low-glycemic diet, 150 min/week zone 2 cardio
WL
Metabolic / Weight Loss
31 patients
92
/100

Patients with BMI 28-40, insulin resistance, prior failed diets. GLP-1 + lifestyle protocols.

Avg Weight Loss
-19.4%
228 lbs → 184 lbs · over 24 wks
-9.1%
Avg Body Fat Reduction
92%
Lean Mass Preserved
-0.5%
A1C Reduction
89%
Adherence Rate
Top protocol: GLP-1 + Protein-Forward Lifestyle High (n=31, p<0.01)
  • Treatment Tirzepatide titrated 2.5 to 10 mg weekly
  • Supplement Whey protein 1g/lb lean mass target
  • Supplement Multivitamin + B12, Omega-3
  • Lifestyle Resistance training 3x/week (lean mass preservation)
  • Monitoring Monthly DEXA, weekly weight + waist
TH
Subclinical Hypothyroid
17 patients
89
/100

TSH elevated with normal-low free T4/T3. Symptoms: fatigue, cold intolerance, hair loss, weight retention.

Avg TSH Normalization
94%
5.8 mIU/L → 1.9 mIU/L · over 14 wks
+3.4 / 5
Energy Score Improvement
-7 lbs avg
Weight Loss
-22%
Reverse T3 Reduction
96%
Adherence Rate
Top protocol: NDT + Cofactor Support Moderate (n=17, p<0.05)
  • Treatment NP Thyroid 30-60mg titrated to symptoms + labs
  • Supplement Selenium 200mcg, Iodine (low-dose), Iron if low ferritin
  • Supplement Vitamin D3, B-complex
  • Monitoring TSH/fT3/fT4/rT3 q6 weeks until stable

What this enables

Faster, more confident protocols

New patient looks like a perimenopause cohort? Start with the protocol that worked for 38 patients before her. Provider always reviews and adjusts.

Continuous learning

As outcomes come in, the system updates "what's working" — including subtle differences (BMI, age, comorbidities) that shift the recommendation.

Better patient conversations

"Patients with your exact profile typically see X improvement in Y weeks on this protocol" — backed by your actual outcome data.
